message:
bench(storage): rename harness to storage_perf and scale ready-query setup

Rename the Criterion harness from the generic `benchmarks` name to
`storage_perf`, matching the actual source file and clarifying intent
when running `cargo bench --bench <name>`. Set `autobenches = false` in
Cargo.toml so Cargo does not auto-register any future bench files under
the old default name.

Thread the rename through the only two external callers:

- `scripts/bench_regression.sh` — both `--save-baseline` and `--baseline`
  invocations.
- `.github/workflows/ci.yml` — the bench-regression job's baseline
  save/compare calls.

Also retune the dependency fixture used by `bench_ready_query`:

- Generate a fully acyclic DAG by having higher-indexed issues depend on
  lower-indexed issues (deterministic, no cycle-check overhead).
- Load dependencies via `sync_dependencies_for_import` so setup time is
  not dominated by per-edge cycle detection — critical for the new
  `(10000, 20000)` point added to the size sweep.
- Rebuild the blocked cache once at the end rather than implicitly per
  insert, matching how import paths perform it in production.

These are pure test/bench plumbing changes — no behavioural changes to
library code, no public API movement.

files.patch:
@@ -281,9 +281,9 @@ jobs:
         run: |
           set -euo pipefail
           if find target/criterion -path "*/main/estimates.json" -type f 2>/dev/null | grep -q .; then
-            cargo bench --bench benchmarks -- --baseline main --save-baseline main
+            cargo bench --bench storage_perf -- --baseline main --save-baseline main
           else
-            cargo bench --bench benchmarks -- --save-baseline main
+            cargo bench --bench storage_perf -- --save-baseline main
           fi
         continue-on-error: true

@@ -3,6 +3,7 @@ name = "beads_rust"
 version = "0.1.45"
 edition = "2024"
 rust-version = "1.88"
+autobenches = false
 description = "Agent-first issue tracker (SQLite + JSONL)"
 license = "MIT"
 repository = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/beads_rust"
@@ -125,7 +126,7 @@ proptest = "1.10"
 rand = "0.10"
 
 [[bench]]
-name = "benchmarks"
+name = "storage_perf"
 path = "benches/storage_perf.rs"
 harness = false

@@ -12,10 +12,10 @@ echo "Running benchmarks with baseline comparison..."
 # Check if baseline exists
 if [ ! -d "target/criterion" ]; then
     echo "No existing baseline found. Saving current run as baseline."
-    cargo bench --bench benchmarks -- --save-baseline "$BASELINE_NAME" "$@"
+    cargo bench --bench storage_perf -- --save-baseline "$BASELINE_NAME" "$@"
 else
     echo "Comparing against existing baseline '$BASELINE_NAME'..."
-    cargo bench --bench benchmarks -- --baseline "$BASELINE_NAME" "$@"
+    cargo bench --bench storage_perf -- --baseline "$BASELINE_NAME" "$@"
 fi
 
 # Run regression check
